sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tu ni-in ah tua gam nuam
Nitum iangin ah ka tung ding hi
Ka lutung aksi taang a om diam?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nitak a ni atum ciangin ah
Ka lutung aksi taang a om diam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka ngah mi bang kei hong hi sak in
Amah phatna tuihual bang om ciang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A khe phungah suang manpha koih ding
Ka lutung aksi taang a om diam?
